summary: Template Wizard feature fully tested. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI flows working: wizard loads with correct fields, live preview updates in real-time, progress bar tracks filled fields, AI Suggest generates suggestions for textarea fields (Gemini integration), Generate PDF creates valid PDF files, Download PDF triggers file download, Proceed to Notarization navigates with template state, Back to Templates link works, 'Use This Template' in library correctly routes to wizard.

issues: React DevTools hydration warning about <span> in <select> - cosmetic, appears to be instrumentation related

critical_code_review_comments: Good: PDF generation uses ReportLab for professional legal document formatting
Good: AI suggest uses Emergent LLM key with proper system prompt for legal content
Good: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Good: Live preview updates in real-time as fields are filled
Good: Progress bar and field counter accurately track filled fields
Good: Generate PDF button correctly disabled until all required fields are filled
Good: Template state properly passed to notarization page via React Router location.state
Good: 'Use This Template' in library now routes to wizard instead of direct notarization

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and flows working

seed_data_creation: Templates auto-seeded on startup via seed_templates() - 8 default templates available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template Wizard feature complete. Wizard available at /templates/{templateId}/fill. Field types: text, textarea (with AI Suggest), number, date. AI Suggest uses Emergent LLM key (Gemini). PDF generation returns binary PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf). All 8 templates work with wizard: tpl_nda (6 fields), tpl_power_of_attorney (6 fields), tpl_lease_agreement (8 fields), tpl_affidavit (5 fields), tpl_last_will (6 fields), tpl_real_estate_purchase (7 fields), tpl_trust_document (6 fields), tpl_general_contract (7 fields).

backend_api.POST /api/templates/tpl_real_estate_purc: Generates valid PDF with optional fields empty - PASS
backend_api.POST /api/templates/tpl_nda/ai-suggest: Returns AI suggestion for textarea field - PASS
backend_api.Authentication required: All endpoints return 401/403 without token - PASS
backend_api.NDA template field validation: 6 fields, correct types (3 text, 1 textarea, 1 number, 1 date) - PASS

frontend_ui.live_preview: Updates in real-time as fields are filled - PASS
frontend_ui.progress_bar: Shows X of Y fields filled accurately - PASS
frontend_ui.generate_pdf_disabled: Disabled until all required fields filled - PASS
frontend_ui.ai_suggest_textarea: AI Suggest button appears on textarea fields, generates suggestions - PASS
frontend_ui.pdf_generation: Creates valid PDF, shows success banner - PASS
frontend_ui.download_pdf: Triggers file download with correct filename - PASS
frontend_ui.proceed_to_notarization: Navigates to /request-notarization with template state - PASS
frontend_ui.template_banner: Shows 'Template Applied' banner on notarization page - PASS
frontend_ui.use_template_routes_to_wizard: 'Use This Template' in library routes to /templates/{id}/fill - PASS
